detail.description:
【Game Features】

【Step on the Gas, Crush the Monsters】

Unique vehicle-based mowing gameplay! No matter how many zombies there are, fear not! Just floor the gas and crush them! Dynamic mowing, a screen-wide harvest, incredibly satisfying!

【Modify Your Vehicle, Unleash Firepower】

Your vehicle is your weapon! Customize the body, machine gun, and armor! The more you modify, the more powerful and exhilarating it becomes!

【Rescue People, Build Your Legend】

Classic hostage rescue gameplay. Success
